author: Austin Crawford
title: Healthy Kids
summary: Spend some time exploring outside with The Nature Conservancy’s Kim Gaffett! Children of all ages are welcome – we’ll meet at the library before heading outside to study nature, move our bodies, and enjoy being outside on BI!
content: Spend some time exploring outside with The Nature Conservancy’s Kim Gaffett! Children of all ages are welcome – we’ll meet at the library before heading outside to study nature, move our bodies, and enjoy being outside on BI!
